title: Analysis services module (input/project resolution and parsing utilities)
body:
## What was done

Introduced **`beskid_analysis` services**: input resolution, project discovery, parsing helpers, and shared analysis utilities used by CLI and (later) LSP entry points.

## Why it mattered

Centralized “how do we find and parse a project?” logic instead of duplicating it across binaries—direct ancestor of today’s shared analyze pipeline inputs.

## Outcome

Foreshadowed `prepared_workspace` / assembly resolution in later bands.

source.subject: Add beskid_analysis services module with input/project resolution, parsing, and analysis utilities
